simple_types.name: File_Mode
simple_types.code:
type File_Mode is (Read,
                   Create_To_Write,
                   Append,
                   Read_Write,
                   Create_To_Read_Write,
                   Append_And_Read,
                   Read_Binary,
                   Create_To_Write_Binary,
                   …,
                   Append_And_Read_Binary);
